name: read-claude-web-conversation
description: >- Read or export the COMPLETE transcript of a Claude.ai web conversation — both private claude.ai/chat/... and public claude.ai/share/... links — by calling Claude.ai's internal API from inside the user's logged-in Chrome, and download its FILES too (uploads, deliverables). Use whenever the user pastes a claude.ai conversation or share link and asks to read, summarize, export, archive, or extract it — "read this Claude conversation", "导出这个网页版对话", "把这个对话拉到本地". Every naive approach fails SILENTLY
author: daymade
